violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Observed no thermometers in refrigerators.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Observed dish sprayer had a damaged seal.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Observed towel dispenser was empty at time of inspection. COS
